parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile', messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You are a precise file editor. Given a file's content and an instruction, output ONLY the complete edited file content. No explanations, no markdown code blocks — just the raw edited file.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'FILE PATH: ' + $json.body.file_path + '

CURRENT CONTENT:
' + $json.body.content + '

INSTRUCTION: ' + $json.body.instruction } ], temperature: 0.1, max_tokens: 4096 }) }}
